item.title: Masters degree in Physics
item.description: I don't even know if 500 downloads is considered a lot but I never thought it would get more than 20 downloads in my life, so I'm doing a little dance. But I'm also sick with COVID so it's not a very good dance. Edit: For those asking for a link to the article, I'm not super comfortable putting my name out there so I'll tell you the title is "Acoustic Waves in the Upper Atmosphere" and allow you to do some research of your own :)
item.dc:creator: IThinkIGotMySwaggerBack

item.title: I always thought models were cool so as an adult I decided to make a scale model of my parents house where I grew up.
item.description:
I haven't shared this with anyone but my family and people who have came by my house. What yall think it's my first one.
Another angle.
I wasn't going to do the Walnut tree but I got bored.
The Model on top and real house on bottom.
I've since added facial board because of this pic. I'm obsessed with getting it exactly like my house.
The Barn
The boat is from a Revell model kit but I made the trailer from scratch.
I decided to add lights which the real barn does not have but the items on the shelf are very close to exact.
item.dc:creator: seth4881

item.title: The nerve of some people...oh wait
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: It's an unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i live somewhat near Boston.. this is true in fall/winter
guilty of this
too cool
i can think of at least 400 reasons
no wonder he wants to marry her
i don't have a wife but i'll be damned if i don't pass out during most movies at home these days. doesn't help that i smoke weed and only get enough sleep on weekends
yeah not my oc and i dont believe in hell but i'll see you there
Stevie loves forehead kisses (really)
i'm already here waiting
mmm hmm
vampire life hack
i dunno, i kind of enjoy drinking water.
in my 'meme dump on imgur' era
well, you've got a skateboard so that's cool
i won't deny it
hate when that happens
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Ten Toon Tuesday
item.description:
All by Jon Adams; scroll to the end for more details.
From his website (https://www.hisportfolio.com/) : I’m an award-winning Art Director, Designer, Illustrator, and Writer. I got my start at a branding agency, have worked for several startups big and small, and freelanced for creative agencies. I do a little bit of everything from web, product, visual, UI/UX, and print design, to editorial illustration, cartoons, and writing. One thing I can't do is grow a beard. But I can Photoshop one pretty well.
item.dc:creator: rabidrob

item.title: Biden with the clapback
item.description: Herbert Hoover does not want to be trump.
item.dc:creator: NiceRead

item.title: Tech memes to keep the servers happy
item.description:
Minor Imgur outage, probably they forgot to feed the servers. Guess it’s up to me now. Enjoy some vaguely tech related stolen memes!
vimtutor helps
Not far off actually…
So close! Imgur was making it rain 503s.
(X) I’m in this picture and I don’t like it
My company got hit pretty bad by scammers who found a way to abuse us to send spam. I came very close to pulling the cables.
Truth.
I miss Limewire
Like every week there’s a new flavor
You are legally not allowed to view this meme until Friday
Haha just kidding. But actually this is true for the Vision Pro.
Kids these days! Well that’s all for now, hopefully this keeps the servers spinning for a little longer.
item.dc:creator: totaleclipseofdescartes

item.title: 123 men were arrested in Florida for human trafficking — Not one was a drag queen
item.description: "The men were arrested after allegedly soliciting sex from undercover agents posing as minors ... among them being a church grief counselor, an elementary school teacher, a nurse at a substance abuse clinic, and a basketball coach ..." https://www.advocate.com/crime/123-arrested-florida-human-trafficking
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: If Bollywood made Star Wars...
item.description:
All the hands and fingers look legit... so it must be real, right? LOL
I wonder if he knows how to change lightbulbs!
For some reason, I can't stop laughing when looking at this, I can only imagine the sounds he's making in an Indian accent lol
wow! just wow!
Who is the golden princess?
I bet they still can't aim
item.dc:creator: MissySassy

item.title: Jesus… knowing what we know now. That look.
item.dc:creator: astronomypictures

item.title: He's a handful.
item.description: Rant time!  My sister is pregnant with her sixth child with her sixth baby daddy.  She claims to be putting the lastest one up for adoption when she's born. Most of the baby daddies are in prison and none of them are in the picture.  Every one of my sister's kids have been born dependent on drugs and needed weaned off. Child services have taken every one of them from her.  She does meth, heroin, crack, all the drugs.  I've had guardianship of multiple of her kids on and off for seventeen years.  At the moment our mom has custody of the other four, she couldn't handle the nephew I have now, he's too much for her.  He's not very well behaved, screams a lot, abuses my dogs, and doesn't listen at all. But we're working on that, baby steps, progress is progress!  My sister won't get on birth control because she "makes pretty babies" and "doesn't want to put any unknown substances in her body."  She's an idiot.  Thanks for listening, imgur. Edit: thanks for all the comments of support, all :) Just wanted to say that we do have a psychiatrist to see my nephew but it's supposed to be scheduled through child services and they're hard to get ahold of so we haven't seen one yet.
item.dc:creator: Sarrina

item.title: The purpose of the collar is to protect the dog wearing it when and if it has to fight wolves. The collar base protects the dog's throat and carotid arteries, while the spikes are intended to deter bites to the neck or even injure wolves trying to do so.
item.dc:creator: DataStream

item.title: "I'm Just Ken" wins Best Original Song at the 29th Annual Critics' Choice Awards & Ryan Gosling is not amused
item.description:
Emotion pictured: ?
Literally "?"
Ryan Gosling to Hollywood: "Did..... Did y'all not watch the rest of the movie....?" He wasn't the one that made the acceptance speech, the songwriters did: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s49oX8Erjv0 I don't know how many times I've broken down in tears listening to "What Was I Made For", written & sung by Billie Eilish, a queer woman who has spoken out repeatedly about not feeling comfortable because her body was being sexualized from a young age and she felt she had to hide her large breasts just so people would listen to her voice and see her dancing without making comments about her body.... But sure, let's give the award to a middling power ballad that can be summed up as "But think of the men" sung by one of the most powerful (but definitely not the most accomplished vocally) male stars in Hollywood? Ryan Gosling's side eye speaks volumes.
item.dc:creator: Saturniidae
